tool_input.content:
import json
import shutil
from collections import Counter
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

base = Path('memory/long_term')
backup_root = Path('memory/cleanup_backups')
stamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
backup_dir = backup_root / f'long_term_cleanup_{stamp}'
backup_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

removed = []
errors = []
kept_items = 0
removed_reason = Counter()

for path in sorted(base.iterdir()):
    name = path.name
    is_tmp = name.startswith('index.') and name.endswith('.tmp')
    is_corrupt_backup = '.corrupt_' in name and name.endswith('.bak')
    if path.is_file() and (name == '.gitkeep' or is_tmp or name == 'index.pending.json' or is_corrupt_backup):
        shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / name)
        path.unlink()
        removed.append(str(path))
        removed_reason['non_canonical_runtime_or_placeholder'] += 1

for path in sorted(base.glob('memory_item_*.json')):
    try:
        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    except Exception as e:
        shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / path.name)
        path.unlink()
        removed.append(str(path))
        removed_reason['invalid_json'] += 1
        errors.append((str(path), str(e)))
        continue

    title = str(data.get('title') or '')
    content = str(data.get('content') or '')
    kind = str(data.get('kind') or data.get('type') or '')
    importance = float(data.get('importance') or 0)
    metadata = data.get('metadata') if isinstance(data.get('metadata'), dict) else {}
    source = str(metadata.get('source') or '').lower()
    task_type = str(metadata.get('task_type') or '').lower()

    is_tool_log = title.startswith('工具执行成功:') or title.startswith('工具执行失败:')
    is_raw_transcript = content.startswith('STDOUT:') or content.startswith('[SEARCH]') or content.startswith('--- 文件:') or content.startswith('📁 ./')
    is_low_importance_tool_memory = kind in {'workflow', 'bug'} and importance <= 0.30 and (source in {'test', 'memory', 'default'} or task_type in {'test_failure', 'general'})

    if is_tool_log and (is_raw_transcript or is_low_importance_tool_memory):
        shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / path.name)
        path.unlink()
        removed.append(str(path))
        removed_reason['low_quality_tool_execution_log'] += 1
    else:
        kept_items += 1

print('BASE', base.resolve())
print('BACKUP', backup_dir.resolve())
print('removed_total', len(removed))
print('kept_memory_items', kept_items)
print('removed_reason', dict(removed_reason))
if errors:
    print('json_errors', errors[:10])
print('sample_removed')
for p in removed[:20]:
    print(' ', p)
